calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terry Beecher appeared by telephone for Patricia Nuckols (Administrator). Laura McCafferty in Propria Persona. Donna Fenn also present.

Ms. McCafferty stated that she already provided Mr. Beecher with a copy of the will and that she can not afford a Lawyer. The petition for final distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Oct-27-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: (both parties appeared telephonically) Terry Beecher for (petitioner) Patricia Nuckols. Laura McCafferty appeared in Propria Persona.

The court addressed the 2014 copyright dated will and asked if Ms. McCafferty had filed documents in support of the 2013 will. Ms. McCafferty stated that she is unclear on how to proceed. Mr. Beecher stated that he advised Ms. McCafferty to obtain counsel, that he is in receipt of a proof of holographic instrument stating that the signer was present when the will was signed, that he has made a search for Jessica Christie, issue of Lewis Christie but is not sure that documents sent have ever reached her. Mr. Beecher also stated that he is not sure if Ms. McCafferty has served the heirs, has concerns regarding the lapse of time as 2 of the heirs have died and another is ill. The court questioned charges of $1,200.00 paid to Mr. Beecher's wife for tax work done on the estate. Mr. Beecher responded that they work in the same office but it is not his practice to refer work to her, however, some clients choose to use her services. The accounting petition was continued to October 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. McCafferty to file documents supporting her claim as well as proof of service on Jessica Christie.

Judge: Paul H. Alavarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Choi. (Not Reported)
